apps.name: CleanCut
apps.shortDescription: Clean up video files before sharing them: mute profanity, generate subtitles, or convert to a more compatible MP4 on your Mac.
apps.longDescription: CleanCut cleans up videos on-device. It can mute profanity, create SRT or embedded subtitles, and convert difficult video files into a broadly compatible MP4 without uploading source media. Use one, two, or all three tools on videos you already have.
apps.license: One activated computer; customers can deactivate before moving Macs.

demo.summary: Watch CleanCut turn a rough video into a clean copy without uploading the file.

notes: CleanCut currently owns the home page until more apps are ready.
Marketing focus shifted toward private video cleanup for files people already have before sharing.
Website promises 14-day refund help for buyers whose setup does not work.
Do not reuse CleanCut's Polar IDs, bundle ID, release repo, or app storage keys for another app.

apps.name: PolishKey
apps.shortDescription: Rewrite selected text from a desktop hotkey, local by default with optional Gemini support.
apps.longDescription: PolishKey rewrites selected text in place using a bundled local rewrite engine by default. It includes distinct Friendly, Professional, and Custom rewrite modes for support replies, emails, notes, and quick messages, plus an optional bring-your-own-key Gemini provider for users who choose cloud AI.
apps.license: One activated computer; customers can deactivate before moving machines.

demo.summary: Watch PolishKey turn a rough selected note into a polished reply without leaving your keyboard.

notes: Do not reuse CleanCut's Polar IDs, bundle ID, release repo, checkout URL, license benefit, app-storage keys, or download assets.
Apple Silicon Mac release v0.2.34 is signed, notarized, stapled, and published from the PolishKey-specific updates repo.
Version 0.2.33 adds a guarded optional Gemini provider, explicit selected-text rewrite framing, Gemini thinking config, thought-part filtering, and source-loss fallback protection.

Version 0.2.34 upgrades Balanced/Careful local quality to qwen3:4b-instruct models, adds automatic Gemini daily-quota fallback to the local engine with automatic recovery, blocks unsafe hotkeys like Cmd+C, and allows single function-key hotkeys.
A real purchase, activation, deactivation, and license move test is still recommended before larger paid promotion.

apps.name: Envelopes
apps.shortDescription: A simple envelope budgeting app for iPhone and iPad that helps you give every dollar a job without linking your bank.
apps.longDescription: Envelopes is a zero-based envelope budgeting app for people who want a clear plan without bank-linking or financial noise. Create accounts and envelopes, assign real money to the jobs it needs to do, log spending, plan bills, and optionally sync through an Envelopes account.
apps.license: Auto-renewable App Store subscription unlocks full native iOS access after the trial. The web app is intentionally not gated by store billing.

demo.summary: See the Envelopes budget, calendar, and account screens from the live App Store listing.

notes: Subscriptions are envelopes_monthly ($2.99/month) and envelopes_annual ($24.99/year), both with a 14-day free trial.
Do not reuse CleanCut or PolishKey Polar IDs, license rules, release assets, storage keys, or bundle IDs.
The web app and sync backend live at https://envelopes-cv5.pages.dev.
